_comment: Milestone 1 scaffold. All M1 reads (users/{uid}, candidate_profiles/{uid}, chat_sessions/{uid}) are single-document reads by uid — no compound queries, so no composite indexes are required yet. M2 (matching engine) will add composite indexes here for job_posts (status + city + job_type + work_arrangement) and candidate_profiles (preferences.cities array-contains + preferences.job_type array-contains), per docs/data-models.md and the firestore-rules skill. Do not add indexes speculatively — add them when the backing query ships.
